sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62852" key="lhqw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ληθώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λήθη</etym>) <sense id="n62852.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lethargic</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕπνος</foreign> Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κῶμα</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
